case_title: 925 GEARY, LLC VS. BYRON PRATT ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 925 GEARY, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRATT, BYRON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 925 GEARY STREET # 103, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109 SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, LEASE FORFEITED, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMSIES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 70096723)

REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 70087025) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF 925 GEARY, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT PRATT, BYRON
